enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a lazy morning in Boulder in February 2016, showing art pieces he primed the day before and planning to finish them. He also riffs on watching Republican debate videos, growing a beard, and his prediction that traditional TV is dying as audiences migrate to the internet.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: TV is dying — audiences and money will collapse as everyone moves to websites and internet channels
the internet has made people smarter and more educated
